seoTitle: Clarkefield vs Clarkes Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clarkefield and Clarkes Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clarkefield vs Clarkes Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clarkefield and Clarkes Hill.
heading: Clarkefield vs Clarkes Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clarkefield, Victoria and Clarkes Hill, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clarkes Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Clarkefield (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clarkefield or Clarkes Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clarkefield has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Clarkes Hill scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clarkefield scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Clarkes Hill scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clarkefield or Clarkes Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clarkes Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
